description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, rectilinear design, surrounded by a dense arrangement of tall palm trees and manicured landscaping. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored plaster and wood paneling, with large glass windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure is single-story, with an open-plan layout visible through the windows and open roof sections, including living spaces and what appears to be a garage. The front facade is defined by a mix of solid and glazed surfaces, with a driveway leading to the garage and a green lawn area. The rear and side elevations are bordered by lush vegetation, offering privacy and a natural aesthetic. The overall impression is of a contemporary, luxurious residence designed for a warm, urban environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and surrounded by tall palm trees and lush landscaping. The exterior combines light plaster and wood paneling, with open-plan living spaces and a visible garage.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open roof layout, interior rooms, and dense palm tree landscaping around the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, large windows, and the extensive row of palm trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden area, more palm trees, and a mix of solid and windowed wall sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a darker lighting, emphasizing the flat roof, side windows, and the thick vegetation barrier.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
